config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update data on row selection. 
	"""
	try:
		messageType = 'locationRoutPanel'   
		headerLabel = "Edit"
		Action = 'Update'
		
		selectedRow = self.props.selection.data
		system.perspective.print(selectedRow)
		for data in	selectedRow:
			MST_LocationRoute_Id = data['MST_LocationRoute_Id']
			MST_RouteStep_Id = data['MST_RouteStep_Id']
			MST_WorkStation_Id = data['MST_WorkStation_Id']
			MST_Area_Id = data['MST_Area_Id']
			MST_Line_Id = data['MST_Line_Id']
			NoOfStep = data['NoOfStep']
			Additional_WorkStation = data['Additional_WorkStation']
			Additional_WorkStationId = data['Additional_WorkStationId']	
			dataset=None
#			if Additional_WorkStation==None or Additional_WorkStation=='null' or str(Additional_WorkStation).strip()=='':
#				Additional_WorkStation=''
#			if Additional_WorkStationId==None or Additional_WorkStationId=='null' or str(Additional_WorkStationId).strip()=='':
#				Additional_WorkStationId=-1
#			else:
#				if "," in Additional_WorkStationId:
#					
#					Additional_WorkStationId='['+Additional_WorkStationId+']'
#					import ast
#					Additional_WorkStationId=ast.literal_eval(Additional_WorkStationId)				
#				else:
#					Additional_WorkStationId=int(Additional_WorkStationId)	
#			system.perspective.print("Additional_WorkStation "+str(Additional_WorkStation))
			IsActive = data['IsActive']
			selectedMSTLocationRouteID = data['MST_LocationRoute_Id']
			if IsActive:
				IsActive = 1
			else:
				IsActive = 0
				
			payload = {
							'headerLabel':headerLabel,
							'MST_LocationRoute_Id':MST_LocationRoute_Id,
							'MST_RouteStep_Id':MST_RouteStep_Id,
							'MST_WorkStation_Id':MST_WorkStation_Id,
							'MST_Area_Id':MST_Area_Id,
							'MST_Line_Id':MST_Line_Id,
							'NoOfStep':NoOfStep,
							'Additional_WorkStation':Additional_WorkStation,
							'Additional_WorkStationId':Additional_WorkStationId,
							'IsActive':IsActive,
							'Action':Action,
							'ds':dataset
					 }
		
			
	
		folderName = 'Project_VECV/LocationRouting'
		colName = 'LocationRoute_Id'
		self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID=selectedMSTLocationRouteID
		system.perspective.print("selectedMSTLocationRouteID %s"%selectedMSTLocationRouteID)
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1,"id":int(selectedMSTLocationRouteID),"folder":str(folderName),"colName":str(colName)}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock('rightView')
	except:
		screenName ='locationRouting'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master/locationRouting')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick -> cntBody/cntBody/tblLocationRouting')   
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

transforms.code:
AreaID = value['AreaID']
	LineID = value['LineID']

	if AreaID == -1:
		AreaID = 0
	if LineID == -1:
		LineID = 0	
	system.perspective.print("AreaID%s"%AreaID)
	system.perspective.print("LineID%s"%LineID)
	params={'AreaID':AreaID,'LineID':LineID,'MST_LocationRoute_Id':0}
	val=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/LocationRouting/getLocationRouting",params)
	return val

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: make table refersh and reset in panel. 
	"""
	try:
		# implement your handler here
		self.refreshBinding("props.data")
		self.session.custom.type='Add'
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'groupPanel'  
		Action = "Save"
		
			
					
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
					'AreaName':-1,
					'LineName':-1,
					'BOMName':-1,
					'GroupName':'',
					'GroupDesc':'',
					'IsActive':1,
					'Action':Action}
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	except:
		#start of except block 
		screenName ='LocationRouting'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/LocationRouting')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:root->tblErPrrof->MessageHandler')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	self.props.selection.selectedRow = payload['Index']

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: remove selection on double click and make reset in panel. 
	"""
	try:
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightS')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")  
	#	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblLocationRouting").selection.selectedRow = -1
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.selection.selectedColumn = ''
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblLocationRouting").props.selection.selectedRow=-1
		
		self.session.custom.dsLocationRout=None
		self.session.custom.selectedMSTLocationRouteID=0
		
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'locationRoutPanel'
		
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
									'MST_Area_Id':-1,
									'MST_Line_Id':-1,
									'NoOfStep':0,
									'IsActive':1,
									'Action':headerLabel,
									'ds':None}			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	except:
		screenName ='LocationRouting'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/LocationRouting')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:root  -> LocationRouting')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
